primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex -- Official Journal of the European Union

published: ISO 13485:2016 -- Medical devices QMS (for Annex I medical device AI)
upcoming: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 17 (expected Q4 2026)

obligations.source_quote: Providers of high-risk AI systems shall put a quality management system in place that ensures compliance with this Regulation. That system shall be documented in a systematic and orderly manner in the form of written policies, procedures and instructions, and shall include at least the following aspects:

decomposed_atoms.description: A quality management system must be in place
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL put a quality management system in place

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must ensure compliance with the Regulation
decomposed_atoms.requirement: QMS SHALL ensure compliance with this Regulation

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must be documented as written policies, procedures, and instructions
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL be documented in a systematic and orderly manner in the form of written policies, procedures and instructions

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for QMS documentation, quality policy, quality manual, procedures documentation
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the QMS is adequate and actually ensures compliance

obligations.source_quote: a strategy for regulatory compliance, including compliance with conformity assessment procedures and procedures for the management of modifications to the high-risk AI system;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include a regulatory compliance strategy
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include a strategy for regulatory compliance including conformity assessment and modification management

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for compliance strategy documentation, conformity assessment procedures, change management procedures

obligations.source_quote: techniques, procedures and systematic actions to be used for the design, design control and design verification of the high-risk AI system;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include design, design control, and verification procedures
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include techniques, procedures and systematic actions for design, design control and design verification

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for design documentation, review processes, verification procedures in code/docs
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether procedures are systematic and adequate

obligations.source_quote: techniques, procedures and systematic actions to be used for the development, quality control and quality assurance of the high-risk AI system;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include development QC/QA procedures
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include development, quality control and quality assurance procedures

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for CI/CD configuration, testing framework, code review processes, QA documentation
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether QA procedures are adequate for high-risk AI

obligations.source_quote: examination, test and validation procedures to be carried out before, during and after the development of the high-risk AI system, and the frequency with which they have to be carried out;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include testing and validation procedures with defined frequency
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include examination, test and validation procedures before, during and after development

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for test suites, validation scripts, test schedules, CI/CD pipelines with testing stages
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether testing frequency and coverage are adequate

obligations.source_quote: technical specifications, including standards, to be applied and, where the relevant harmonised standards are not applied in full or do not cover all of the relevant requirements set out in Section 2, the means to be used to ensure that the high-risk AI system complies with those requirements;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include applicable technical specifications and standards
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include technical specifications and standards to be applied

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for standards reference documentation, technical specifications
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether all applicable standards are identified and applied

obligations.source_quote: systems and procedures for data management, including data acquisition, data collection, data analysis, data labelling, data storage, data filtration, data mining, data aggregation, data retention and any other operation regarding the data that is performed before and for the purpose of the placing on the market or the putting into service of high-risk AI systems;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include comprehensive data management procedures
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include systems and procedures for data management (acquisition, collection, analysis, labelling, storage, filtration, mining, aggregation, retention)

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for data management documentation, data pipelines, data governance policies
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether data management covers all listed operations

obligations.source_quote: the risk management system referred to in Article 9;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include the Art. 9 risk management system
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include the risk management system per Art. 9

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check if Art. 9 risk management documentation exists and is referenced in QMS
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether risk management is integrated into QMS

obligations.source_quote: the setting-up, implementation and maintenance of a post-market monitoring system, in accordance with Article 72;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include post-market monitoring system per Art. 72
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include post-market monitoring system per Art. 72

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for post-market monitoring documentation, telemetry systems, feedback collection
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether monitoring system meets Art. 72 requirements

obligations.source_quote: procedures related to the reporting of a serious incident in accordance with Article 73;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include serious incident reporting procedures per Art. 73
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include serious incident reporting procedures per Art. 73

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for incident response plans, reporting procedures

obligations.source_quote: the handling of communication with national competent authorities, other relevant authorities, including those providing or supporting the access to data, notified bodies, other operators, customers or other interested parties;

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include procedures for communication with authorities and stakeholders
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include procedures for handling communication with authorities, notified bodies, operators, and customers

obligations.source_quote: systems and procedures for record-keeping of all relevant documentation and information;

decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include record-keeping systems for all relevant documentation

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for documentation management systems, version control, document retention policies
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether record-keeping covers all relevant documentation

obligations.source_quote: resource management, including security-of-supply related measures;

decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include resource management including security-of-supply measures

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for resource management documentation, supply chain documentation

obligations.source_quote: an accountability framework setting out the responsibilities of the management and other staff with regard to all the aspects listed in this paragraph.

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS must include accountability framework with roles and responsibilities
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include accountability framework for management and staff responsibilities

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for RACI matrix, roles documentation, accountability documentation
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether accountability framework covers all QMS aspects

obligations.source_quote: The implementation of the aspects referred to in paragraph 1 shall be proportionate to the size of the provider's organisation. Providers shall, in any event, respect the degree of rigour and the level of protection required to ensure the compliance of their high-risk AI systems with this Regulation.

decomposed_atoms.description: QMS implementation must be proportionate but always ensure compliance
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL be proportionate to size but always ensure compliance

automation_assessment.detection_method: Cannot be automated — requires judgment about proportionality
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether QMS is proportionate yet adequate for the system's risk level

obligations.source_quote: Providers of high-risk AI systems that are subject to obligations regarding quality management systems or an equivalent function under relevant sectoral Union law may include the aspects listed in paragraph 1 as part of the quality management systems pursuant to that law.

decomposed_atoms.description: May integrate Art. 17 aspects into existing sectoral QMS
decomposed_atoms.requirement: MAY include aspects in existing sectoral QMS

automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether sectoral QMS covers all Art. 17 aspects
